description: You are an automotive mechanic at an independent MOT testing station in the UK performing a pre-MOT check on an Alfa Romeo MiTo 1.4 TB (2010) after a battery disconnection. Determine if the vehicle is ready for an official MOT emissions test by analyzing the engine control module via Multiecuscan (simulation mode). Evaluate all stored and pending Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) against the database at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MultiecuscanData\dtc_database_full.csv and assess the status of all OBD-II readiness monitors. Generate a formal pre-MOT readiness report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MultiecuscanTasks\emissions_readiness_report.txt that includes vehicle/ECU info from the desktop
natural_language: Pre-MOT emissions readiness check for an Alfa Romeo MiTo petrol. Connect to the Engine ECU, read all OBD-II readiness monitors and DTCs, then write a formal pre-MOT readiness report stating whether the car can pass the emissions test and what drive cycles are needed to complete any incomplete monitors.
